title: Add caching system with Redis and memory adapters
description: Add a caching system with Redis cache adapter in src/cache/redisAdapter.ts with get/set/delete methods, in-memory cache adapter in src/cache/memoryAdapter.ts with TTL support, and cache manager in src/cache/cacheManager.ts that selects adapter based on configuration. The memory adapter should reuse the existing Cache class from src/utils/cache.ts which already provides TTL and LRU eviction. The adapters should use the Result type from src/utils/result.ts for explicit error handling. The cache manager should follow the DI container pattern from src/utils/di-container.ts for adapter selection.
existing_patterns: src/utils/cache.ts - existing Cache class with TTL and LRU eviction that memoryAdapter should reuse instead of duplicating
src/utils/result.ts - Result<T, E> discriminated union for explicit error handling; adapters should return Result types
src/utils/di-container.ts - token-based DI pattern with singleton/transient lifecycles; cacheManager could use tokens for adapter selection
